captions.instagram: Marvel just cast a new Thor for its animated kids series. Voice actor Liam Karlsson will play a younger, brash version of the God of Thunder, joined by Nylan Parthipan as Loki. They debut in 'Iron Man and His Awesome Friends' on Disney Junior. Full story at The Screen Report, link in bio. Is Liam Karlsson the right voice for a younger Thor? #Marvel #Thor #Loki #DisneyJunior #IronManAndHisAwesomeFriends #VoiceActing #Animation #MCU #KidsTV #NewCast
captions.facebook: Marvel's animated universe has a new God of Thunder! Voice actor Liam Karlsson is playing a younger Thor in the Disney Junior series 'Iron Man and His Awesome Friends,' with Nylan Parthipan voicing Loki. What do you think of this kid-friendly take on the characters?

pinterest.title: Meet Marvel's New Animated Thor
pinterest.description: Voice actor Liam Karlsson is the new Thor in Marvel's animated kids series 'Iron Man and His Awesome Friends' on Disney Junior. He plays a younger, brash version of the God of Thunder, distinct from the MCU's Chris Hemsworth. Nylan Parthipan joins the cast as the voice of Loki. The characters debut in the episode 'The Mighty Thor and Mischievous Loki,' where Loki enchants the team's vehicles. Karlsson is confirmed to reprise his role in the upcoming 2027 series 'Avengers: Mightiest Friends.'

youtube.title: Marvel Just Cast A New Thor #Shorts
youtube.description: Voice actor Liam Karlsson is the new Thor in Marvel's animated kids series 'Iron Man and His Awesome Friends' on Disney Junior. He's joined by Nylan Parthipan as Loki. This younger, brash Thor is distinct from the MCU version and will return in 'Avengers: Mightiest Friends' in 2027. Full story at The Screen Report.

captions.x: Marvel just cast a new Thor. Voice actor Liam Karlsson will play a younger, brash God of Thunder in the Disney Junior series 'Iron Man and His Awesome Friends,' with Nylan Parthipan as Loki. He's set to return in a 2027 Avengers series. #Marvel #Thor

spoken: Marvel just cast a new Thor. Voice actor Liam Karlsson. He plays a younger, brash God of Thunder. And he's joined by a new Loki. Nylan Parthipan voices the trickster god. They debut in the Disney Junior series 'Iron Man and His Awesome Friends.' The episode sees Loki enchant the team's vehicles. So Thor has to team up with Ironheart and Iron Hulk. This kid-friendly Thor is distinct from Chris Hemsworth's MCU version. He'll return in a new Avengers series for Disney Junior in 2027. Full story at The Screen Report, link in bio. Is Liam Karlsson the right voice for a younger Thor?
